final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: e-commerce landing page hero section mockup
Asset type: web UI mockup, Japanese beauty/skincare brand landing page
Primary request: clean bright airy feminine hero section with floral accents and purple flowers, soft pink and white color palette
Scene/backdrop: minimal white studio background with subtle purple flower petals and soft bokeh, elegant feminine atmosphere
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum, product packaging box displayed alongside
Style/medium: digital UI mockup, clean modern web design, photorealistic product photography integration
Composition/framing: three-column layout (left text content, center model, right product display), full-width hero section, generous whitespace
Lighting/mood: soft diffused lighting, bright and airy atmosphere, gentle shadows, welcoming and trustworthy mood
Color palette: soft pink + pure white + subtle purple flower accents + gold highlights for stat cards
Materials/textures: smooth glass dropper bottle, matte white packaging box, soft skin texture, delicate flower petals, rounded UI elements
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: maintain clean whitespace, keep all Japanese text legible, preserve feminine aesthetic with purple floral accents, pill-shaped badges with icons, pink checkmarks for bullet points, floating white stat cards with gold accents
Avoid: cluttered layout, dark shadows, masculine colors, deformed hands, illegible small text, watermark
